title: Karlson Pfannschmidt
text: Home * People * Karlson Pfannschmidt Karlson Pfannschmidt [1] Karlson Pfannschmidt , (Kiudee) a German computer scientist specialized in machine learning , affiliated with the Paderborn University . He designed and published tools for local and distributed tuning of chess engines using state-of-the-art Bayesian optimization [2] . His Bayesian implementation of a sequential model-based optimization, dubbed Bayes-skopt [3] was successfully applied to tune hyperparameters of Leela Chess Zero and its relatives [4] .
